subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath strengthened His loved ones with patience and endurance, and hath enabled them to remain steadfast in that which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی اید اولیائه علی الصبر و الاصطبار و وفقهم علی الاستقرار علی ما
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @consolation and comfort, @power of prayer, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @service to others; to the Cause of God
